title: The pipeline of Hi-C assembly
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9bo6m","text":"From here, You can know detail methods of Hi-C assembly of the Betta splendens genome.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Get raw Hi-C sequencing data in Fastq format and reference genome(the result of SOAPdenovo2) . Filter the input raw sequences by using HiC-Pro (v. 2.8.0). Using parameters'MIN_INSERT_SIZE = 50 MAX_INSERT_SIZE = 2000',others are default parameters
Extract valid pairs reads according the HiC-Pro result.

1. Run Juicer (v. 1.5) to prepare data for 3D de novo (v.170123) assembly with valid pairs reads. 2. Run 3D de novo (v.170123) assembly to assemble into chromosome 1-Note: Using default parameter 2-Note: Using parameter'-m haploid -s 4 -c 21'
creator: Kailong Ma
